_comment_transition_map: Optional example only. Transition ids and status names vary by Jira workflow. Keep this empty until you verify valid transitions for your own project.
_comment_board_sprint: Optional example only. Run 'boards' mode to get boardId. Run 'sprints <boardId>' to list sprints. sprintField is often customfield_10020 but should be verified with 'fields' mode for your Jira instance.
_comment_assignee: Optional example only. Run 'members' mode to get real accountId values per person. Adapt the mapping to your own team structure, modules, and ownership rules.
